metadata.title: Terms and Conditions | LIFO.AI
metadata.description: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy for LIFO.AI food waste management platform

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By creating an account and using the LIFO application and website (collectively, the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions, including our privacy practices described herein. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
section2.content: LIFO provides batch-level inventory management software designed to help retail stores track product expiration dates, reduce food waste, and optimize discount and donation decisions through image recognition technology and data analytics.

section3.title: 3. User Accounts
items: Providing accurate information during registration
Maintaining the security of your account credentials
All activities that occur under your account
Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized access
section3.outro: We may assign different user roles (admin, manager, employee) with varying access levels to support your store operations.

whatWeCollect.title: What Data We Collect:
items: Account information (name, email, store details, user role)
Inventory data (product names, batch numbers, expiration dates, quantities)
Product images captured through scanning (processed for expiration date recognition)
Usage data (actions taken, scan timestamps, discount/donation decisions)
Device information (browser type, operating system, IP address)

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Data:
items: To provide and maintain the Service functionality
To generate discount and donation recommendations
To create analytics dashboards showing inventory value and waste metrics
To improve our image recognition algorithms
To communicate important Service updates
To ensure compliance with food waste regulations

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis (GDPR):
legalBasis.intro: We process your data based on:
items: Performance of contract (providing the Service you signed up for)
Legitimate interests (improving our Service, preventing fraud)
Your consent (where explicitly requested)

yourData.title: Your Data:
yourData.content: You retain full ownership of all data you input into the Service. Your data is stored securely on servers located in the European Union and is encrypted both in transit and at rest.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention:
dataRetention.content: We retain your data for as long as your account remains active. Upon account deletion, we will delete or anonymize your data within 90 days, except where retention is required by law.

section6.title: 6. Data Sharing and Third Parties
section6.intro: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data only:
items: With service providers who help us operate the Service (cloud hosting, analytics)
When required by law or legal process
To protect our rights or prevent fraud
With your explicit consent
section6.outro: All third-party processors are contractually bound to GDPR standards.

section7.title: 7. Your Privacy Rights (GDPR)
items: Access your personal data and receive a copy
Rectify inaccurate or incomplete data
Delete your data ("right to be forgotten")
Port your data to another service in a structured format
Object to certain data processing activities
Restrict processing in specific circumstances
Withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent
section7.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at

section8.title: 8. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
section8.intro: We currently use essential cookies necessary for Service functionality (authentication, session management). We may implement additional cookies in the future for:
items: Analytics and performance monitoring
User preference storage
Service improvement
section8.outro: You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may limit Service functionality. We will update you if we introduce new cookie types.

section9.title: 9. User Responsibilities
items: Use the Service in compliance with all applicable laws and food safety regulations
Ensure accuracy of expiration dates and product information entered
Verify product safety independently; LIFO recommendations are advisory only
Not misuse, disrupt, or attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service
Not use the Service for any unlawful or fraudulent purpose
Maintain appropriate backup systems for critical business data

section10.title: 10. Service Availability and Changes
section10.content: We strive to provide reliable service but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the Service with reasonable notice. Material changes to these Terms will be communicated via email or in-app notification.

section11.title: 11. Intellectual Property
section11.content: The Service, including its design, features, image recognition technology, and underlying software, is owned by LIFO and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, reverse engineer, or create derivative works from any part of the Service.

section12.title: 12. Data Security
section12.intro: We implement industry-standard security measures including:
items: Encryption of data in transit (TLS/SSL) and at rest
Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments
Access controls and authentication mechanisms
Secure development practices
section12.outro: However, no system is completely secure. You acknowledge that you provide data at your own risk.

section13.title: 13. Limitation of Liability
section13.intro: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. LIFO is not liable for:
items: Business decisions made based on Service recommendations
Food safety incidents or regulatory compliance issues
Loss of data due to technical failures or user error
Indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages
Service interruptions or data breaches despite reasonable security measures
section13.outro: Maximum liability is limited to the amount paid for the Service in the preceding 12 months.

section14.title: 14. Termination
section14.intro: Either party may terminate this agreement at any time. Upon termination:
items: Your access to the Service will cease immediately
You may request export of your data within 30 days
We will delete your data in accordance with Section 5 and GDPR requirements
Outstanding fees remain due

section15.title: 15. Data Breach Notification
section15.content: In the event of a data breach affecting your personal data, we will notify you and relevant supervisory authorities within 72 hours as required by GDPR, providing information about the nature of the breach and remedial actions taken.

section16.title: 16. International Data Transfers
section16.intro: If we transfer data outside the EU, we ensure adequate protection through:
items: Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the EU Commission
Adequacy decisions
Other lawful transfer mechanisms under GDPR

section17.title: 17. Children's Privacy
section17.content: The Service is not intended for individuals under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from children.

section18.title: 18. Governing Law and Disputes
section18.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the European Union and the Netherlands. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

section19.title: 19. Contact Information
section19.intro: For questions about these Terms, privacy concerns, or to exercise your GDPR rights:

section20.title: 20. Supervisory Authority
section20.content: You have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority if you believe we have violated GDPR or your privacy rights.

finalStatement.content: By using LIFO, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions, including our data collection and privacy practices.
